programme.desc: Osasuna have won only one of their last 11 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona and are currently on their longest ever run without a clean sheet against the Blaugrana in the competition. programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. programme.title: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Aston Villa won this exact fixture 2-0 last season, last beating Tottenham Hotspur in consecutive home league games in May/November 2004. Tottenham Hotspur have lost six of their last 10 Premier League games against Aston Villa, more than they had in their previous 34 against the Villans.

programme.title: Espanyol vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: RCD Espanyol have won three of their last six home games against Real Madrid in LaLiga, as many victories as in their previous 15 such meetings in the top flight. Real Madrid have won 109 of their 179 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, the record for the most wins by one team against another in the history of the competition.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20. programme.title: Sunderland vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United, with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition. programme.title: Manchester City vs Brentford - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola. Brentford have lost three of their four Premier League away games against Manchester City, with the exception being a 2-1 win in November 2022.

programme.title: Real Sociedad vs Real Betis - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Real Sociedad have lost their last two LaLiga matches against Real Betis, as many defeats as in their previous nine meetings in the competition ; they have not lost three or more in a row against them in the top flight since April 2004. Among current LaLiga teams, Real Sociedad only have a lower home defeat percentage in the competition against Elche than against Real Betis.

Manchester United have lost just one of their 15 visits to the Stadium of Light to face Sunderland in the Premier League, going down 2-1 in February 2016.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Brentford - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola. Brentford have lost three of their four Premier League away games against Manchester City, with the exception being a 2-1 win in November 2022.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. Arsenal have won their last two away league games against West Ham, winning 6-0 in 2023-24 and 5-2 last season. In English league history, only West Brom have scored 5+ goals in three consecutive away games against an opponent.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Paris SG have scored 13 goals without conceding a single one in their last three matches against Brest in all competitions. Paris SG are on a 33-match unbeaten run against Brest in all competitions, the joint-longest unbeaten streak in their history against a single opponent.

programme.title: Atlético De Madrid vs Celta Vigo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Atlético de Madrid are unbeaten in their last 14 LaLiga matches against Celta de Vigo, their longest ever unbeaten run against the Galicians in the competition. At home, Atlético de Madrid have avoided defeat in their last 13 LaLiga matches against Celta de Vigo, having lost four of their previous five ; since 2014/15, they have only drawn more home games in the competition against Villarreal and Real Madrid than against Celta.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won eight of their last 12 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona, as many victories as they managed in their previous 32 ElClásico encounters in the competition. None of the last 12 LaLiga meetings between Real Madrid and FC Barcelona have ended in a draw, the longest run without a stalemate in ElClásico in the competition since a streak of 18 matches between 1977 and 1986.

programme.title: Liga Extra -
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Les temps forts de la Liga sont a l'honneur: matchs cles, moments decisifs, analyses d'experts et decryptages tactiques vous plongent au cœur du football espagnol.

programme.title: Bayern vs PSG - Champions League - DR - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Les passionnes de football du monde entier sont invites a suivre l'une des compétitions les plus prestigieuses: la Ligue des champions. Avec les plus grands clubs européens en quête du titre ultime, le spectacle est garanti du debut a la fin

programme.title: Arsenal vs Atlético Madrid - Champions League - DR - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Les passionnes de football du monde entier sont invites a suivre l'une des compétitions les plus prestigieuses: la Ligue des champions. Avec les plus grands clubs européens en quête du titre ultime, le spectacle est garanti du debut a la fin

programme.title: Valence vs Atlético Madrid - Liga - J34 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Vingt clubs, trente-huit journees intenses. La Liga est le grand spectacle du football espagnol ou les legendes naissent, les rivalites s'enflamment et chaque match ecrit un nouveau chapitre dans la quete de gloire.

programme.title: Nice vs Lens - Ligue 1 - J32 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Une couverture en direct de la premiere ligue professionnelle de football en France, ou vingt equipes determinees s'affrontent dans des matchs electrisants pour decrocher le titre national tant convoite.

programme.title: Twins vs Nationals - MLB - Baseball 2026
programme.desc: Sport, Baseball. Trente equipes, reparties entre la ligue nationale et la ligue Americaine, s'affrontent tout au long d'une saison palpitante, avec un seul objectif : decrocher la gloire ultime des World Series.

programme.title: Man City vs Southampton - FA Cup - D - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Ne manquez rien de l'intensite de la FA Cup, la deuxieme competition la plus prestigieuse pour les clubs anglais apres la Premier League.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Leeds - FA Cup - D - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Ne manquez rien de l'intensite de la FA Cup, la deuxieme competition la plus prestigieuse pour les clubs anglais apres la Premier League.

programme.title: Espanyol vs Real Madrid - Liga - J34 - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Vingt clubs, trente-huit journees intenses. La Liga est le grand spectacle du football espagnol ou les legendes naissent, les rivalites s'enflamment et chaque match ecrit un nouveau chapitre dans la quete de gloire.

programme.title: Or Norme P04 - Handball - Documentaire
programme.desc: Sport, Handball. Revivez la celebration des 30 ans du tout premier titre mondial de l'equipe de France de handball. Plongez dans les souvenirs avec les champions qui ont marque l'histoire et bati la legende des Bleus.

programme.title: Salon VIP - Magazine 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football, Sport magazine. Interviews exclusives de joueurs et temoignages de supporters passionnes : plongez dans les coulisses du football avec des points de vue d'inities, des histoires inedites et des debats enflammes autour du ballon rond. Host: Claire Arnoux.

programme.title: Made in England -
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Revivez les moments cles et les matchs incontournables de la Premier League anglaise, avec des analyses d'experts, des commentaires pointus et des decryptages tactiques.

programme.title: Doc 2023 Pourquoi Moi - Magazine - Documentaire
programme.desc: Sport, Biography. Explore l'aspect mental du sport, devoilant comment les meilleurs athletes reflechissent, s'adaptent et surmontent leurs adversaires sous une pression intense.

programme.title: Terrains D'espoirs - Football - Documentaire
programme.desc: Sport, Debate, Football. L'emission suit de jeunes footballeurs camerounais, entre terrains en terre battue et tournois de detection, et revele leurs reves, leurs sacrifices et leur quete du football local a l'international.

programme.title: Qualifying - Moto 3 - France Round 2026
programme.desc: The Americas GP at Circuit of the Americas features Moto3, Moto2, and MotoGP across a full race weekend, including qualifying, the MotoGP Sprint, and the main races. The challenging layout combines long straights with technical corners, testing braking, acceleration, and consistency as riders battle for key early-season championship points.

programme.title: Qualifying - Moto 2 - France Round
programme.desc: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demanding round.

programme.title: Qualifying - MotoGP - France 2026
programme.desc: The MotoGP paddock arrives at Jerez for the Spanish Grand Prix, where MotoGP, Moto2 and Moto3 come together at one of the sport’s most iconic and atmospheric tracks. Famous for its passionate crowd and technical layout, Jerez is a circuit that rewards precision, balance, and confidence, setting the stage for intense racing throughout the weekend in all three categories.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their 15 Premier League games against Newcastle, losing nine of the last 10. The only victory came at St James’ Park in December 2023. Newcastle are unbeaten in all seven of their Premier League away games against Nottingham Forest, both the most they’ve faced an opponent without losing and the most Forest have faced a side without winning in the competition.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. Arsenal have won their last two away league games against West Ham, winning 6-0 in 2023-24 and 5-2 last season. In English league history, only West Brom have scored 5+ goals in three consecutive away games against an opponent.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against in the Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League, winning 4-0 at the Emirates and drawing 1-1 at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium this season. Only two other managers have gone unbeaten in their first three games against Atlético boss Diego Simeone in the competition: Carlo Ancelotti and Maurizio Sarri. Winless in their two games against Arsenal this season, Atlético Madrid last faced an opponent 3+ times in a single campaign without managing a victory in 2022-23, versus Real Madrid.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20. Following their 2-1 win at Stamford Bridge in October, Chelsea are looking to complete the league double over Liverpool for the first time since 2013-14.

programme.title: Sunderland vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United, with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition. programme.title: Manchester City vs Brentford - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola. programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their 15 Premier League games against Newcastle, losing nine of the last 10. The only victory came at St James’ Park in December 2023. Newcastle are unbeaten in all seven of their Premier League away games against Nottingham Forest, both the most they’ve faced an opponent without losing and the most Forest have faced a side without winning in the competition.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. Arsenal have won their last two away league games against West Ham, winning 6-0 in 2023-24 and 5-2 last season. In English league history, only West Brom have scored 5+ goals in three consecutive away games against an opponent.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won eight of their last 12 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona, as many victories as they managed in their previous 32 ElClásico encounters in the competition. None of the last 12 LaLiga meetings between Real Madrid and FC Barcelona have ended in a draw, the longest run without a stalemate in ElClásico in the competition since a streak of 18 matches between 1977 and 1986.

programme.title: Liverpool vs Chelsea - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Liverpool have lost their last two Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 20. They last lost three in a row against the Blues between December 2013 and November 2014. Following their 2-1 win at Stamford Bridge in October, Chelsea are looking to complete the league double over Liverpool for the first time since 2013-14.

programme.title: Sunderland vs Manchester United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Sunderland have won just three of their 33 Premier League games against Manchester United, with their 24 defeats against the Red Devils their most against any opponent in the competition. Manchester United have lost just one of their 15 visits to the Stadium of Light to face Sunderland in the Premier League, going down 2-1 in February 2016.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Brentford - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola. Brentford have lost three of their four Premier League away games against Manchester City, with the exception being a 2-1 win in November 2022.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. Arsenal have won their last two away league games against West Ham, winning 6-0 in 2023-24 and 5-2 last season. In English league history, only West Brom have scored 5+ goals in three consecutive away games against an opponent.

programme.title: Ep 35 Inside Fra - This is Paris - Football 2025-2026
programme.desc: Sport, Football. Suivez de pres le parcours du Paris Saint-Germain avec une couverture complete des dernieres infos, des resultats et des prochains rendez-vous, alors que le club emblematique continue de marquer l'histoire de la Ligue 1 depuis 1974.

programme.title: Avant Match PSG Lyon OU - Coupe de France Femme - Football 2026

programme.desc: Sport, Football. Dans un tournoi a elimination directe, les clubs feminins s affrontent tour apres tour, chaque match determinant la qualification.

programme.title: Arsenal vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Arsenal have never lost in 32 home league games against Fulham, the most any side has faced another without defeat in English Football League history. Fulham have won just one of their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, a 2-1 home win in December 2023.

programme.title: Everton vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Everton have lost their last eight home league games against Manchester City, their longest run of consecutive defeats against an opponent in their history. Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 17 Premier League games against Everton, since a 4-0 loss in January 2017.

programme.title: Manchester United vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Sevilla vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Sevilla lost their last LaLiga meeting with Espanyol 2-1 in the reverse fixture this season, ending a 12-game unbeaten run against them ; they could now suffer a league double against the Periquitos for the fourth time in their history, having previously done so in 1943/44, 1948/49 and 1965/66. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.

programme.title: Ligue 1: Iconic Players Best of Blanc , Ibrahimovic and Niang in Ligue 1
programme.desc: Ligue 1 Legends, program talks about the main achievements and numbers of three legends played in French league. Laurent Blanc , Zlatan Ibrahimovic and Mamadou Niang.

programme.title: The last Dante
programme.desc: The fight goes on for OGC Nice and Dante from training sessions to the pitch and inside the locker room. Competing on all fronts, the club is fully engaged in both Ligue 1 and the “Coupe de France”. A meeting with fighters Manon Fleurot to discuss the challenges and battles ahead.

programme.title: Elche vs Deportivo Alavés - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Elche have won two and lost three of their five LaLiga matches against Alavés; only against Rayo Vallecano have they played more top-flight matches without recording a single draw. At home, Elche have won four of their last seven matches in all competitions against Alavés, having lost their previous three such meetings.

programme.title: Sevilla vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Sevilla lost their last LaLiga meeting with Espanyol 2-1 in the reverse fixture this season, ending a 12-game unbeaten run against them ; they could now suffer a league double against the Periquitos for the fourth time in their history, having previously done so in 1943/44, 1948/49 and 1965/66. Sevilla are unbeaten in their last 12 home LaLiga games against Espanyol, since a 1-2 defeat in January 2011; if they score in this match, they will record their longest scoring streak at home against them in the top flight.

programme.title: The last Dante
programme.desc: At 42 years old, the Brazilian players of Nice, Dante, is playing his last season of his career. For his last season as professional, he opens the door to follow him and remember his best moments

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Everton - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Crystal Palace have won just one of their last 22 Premier League games against Everton, and are winless in eight since a 3-1 win in December 2021. Everton have lost just two of their 16 Premier League away games against Crystal Palace, going down 1-0 in October 1994 and 3-1 in December 2021.

programme.title: Lens vs Nantes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Lens have not lost any of their last 10 home matches against Nantes in Ligue 1, since a 1-0 defeat in March 2003 at the Stade Bollaert-Delelis. Lens could mathematically secure a top two finish in Ligue 1 in this match, for the second time after 2022-23. Since Lens' promotion in 2020-21, only Paris SG and Marseille have finished in the top two on multiple occasions.

programme.title: Metz vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Metz have lost 53% of their Ligue 1 matches against Lorient, compared to just 17% in Ligue 2. After drawing the reverse fixture 1-1 in January, Metz could avoid defeat in both of their matches against Lorient in the same season for the second time in their nine campaigns together in the top-flight, after having previously done so in 1998-99.

programme.title: Rennes vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Along with Marseille, Rennes are one of two teams to have beaten both Paris SG and Paris FC in Ligue 1 this season, winning 1-0 against PFC in November and 3-1 against PSG in February. Rennes have failed to win only one of their six home matches against Paris FC in all competitions, though that defeat was the joint-heaviest in their home history, losing 0-5 in Ligue 2 in December 1977.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 35
programme.desc: Real Madrid have won eight of their last 12 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona, as many victories as they managed in their previous 32 ElClásico encounters in the competition. programme.title: Fulham vs A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: Fulham have won just two of their nine Premier League meetings with Bournemouth – 1-0 away in April 2019 and 3-1 at home in February 2024. Bournemouth have won their last two Premier League games against Fulham. They’re looking to complete the double over them for the first time in the competition, last doing so in any division in 2014-15.

programme.title: Rennes vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Along with Marseille, Rennes are one of two teams to have beaten both Paris SG and Paris FC in Ligue 1 this season, winning 1-0 against PFC in November and 3-1 against PSG in February. Rennes have failed to win only one of their six home matches against Paris FC in all competitions, though that defeat was the joint-heaviest in their home history, losing 0-5 in Ligue 2 in December 1977.

programme.title: Toulouse vs Olympique Lyonnais - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: After winning the reverse fixture 2-1 in October, Toulouse could win both their matches against Lyon in a single Ligue 1 season for the first time since 1965–66, after 30 seasons in which both clubs have competed in the top-flight since. Toulouse have lost seven of their last eight home Ligue 1 matches against Lyon, conceding at least twice in each of those defeats. Prior to this run, Toulouse had lost only six of their 34 top-flight home games against Lyon.

programme.title: RC Strasbourg Alsace vs OGC Nice - French Cup - 2025/26 - Semi Final's

programme.title: PALESTINE, ONE JERSEY, MANY ROOTS
programme.desc: Uniting across borders, Palestine's national football team becomes a symbol of identity, resilience, and hope, carrying a nation's dreams.

programme.title: The Chippo Academy, the start of the success
programme.desc: Youssef Chippo opened in 2019 an Academy of Football in Morocco. Recently some players have been selected with the different national teams. beIN visits the Chippo Academy and tells you the story behind this project.

programme.title: Albacete vs Cultural Leonesa - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Lamine Yamal - The Future Of Football
programme.desc: Lamine Yamal, a prodigy developed at La Masia, has risen at a remarkably young age to the world stage of football thanks to his talent, maturity and creativity. Through his rapid ascent, this documentary asks a key question : is he just an early phenomenon, or true embodiment of the future of modern football ?

programme.title: Le Havre vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Le Havre have lost each of their last 10 Ligue 1 matches against Olympique de Marseille, their longest losing streak against a single opponent in the top-flight. Le Havre are winless in their last 11 home Ligue 1 matches against Olympique de Marseille, after having won eight of their first 10.

programme.title: Rennes vs Paris FC - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Along with Marseille, Rennes are one of two teams to have beaten both Paris SG and Paris FC in Ligue 1 this season, winning 1-0 against PFC in November and 3-1 against PSG in February. Rennes have failed to win only one of their six home matches against Paris FC in all competitions, though that defeat was the joint-heaviest in their home history, losing 0-5 in Ligue 2 in December 1977.

programme.desc: Le Havre have lost each of their last 10 Ligue 1 matches against Olympique de Marseille, their longest losing streak against a single opponent in the top-flight. programme.title: Albacete vs Cultural Leonesa - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2

programme.title: Football Cases : HAS Guardiola Killed Football ?

programme.title: Aix vs Tremblay - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.desc: Real Sociedad have lost their last two LaLiga matches against Real Betis, as many defeats as in their previous nine meetings in the competition ; they have not lost three or more in a row against them in the top flight since April 2004. programme.title: Amir Cup 2025/2026 - Final

programme.title: Ligue 1 Weekly Review - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Each Ligue 1 Match week is condensed into a 52-minute highlights show. Every game, goal, penalty, red card and everything in between is squeezed into an action-packed hour to ensure no football fan misses a kick across the game season.

programme.title: Red Star vs Montpellier - French Ligue 2 - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.

programme.title: Leganes vs Racing - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Angers SCO vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 33
programme.desc: Angers have conceded five or more goals in three Ligue 1 matches this season – a joint-high tally alongside Metz – with their heaviest defeat coming against Strasbourg. After three consecutive home defeats against them between 2020 and 2022, Angers won their last home Ligue 1 match against Strasbourg, which also took place on MD33 last season.

programme.title: Coquimbo Unido (CHI) vs Universitario (PER) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD4
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.
